name: Cinnamon Rolls W/Dried Cranberries and Pecans
recipeIngredient: 1 Sue's Swiss bread dough, risen until doubled in volume (see recipe)
1 toasted until golden brown and chopped coarsely
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: St. Louis Post-Dispatch, 3/24/97
1. Lightly oil a 9-inch-by-13-inch baking sheet.
2. On a floured board or counter, roll out dough into a 16-by-12-inch rectangle.
3. Mix cranberries, nuts, and maple syrup in a small bowl; spread evenly over dough, leaving a 1/2-inch margin on all sides.
4. Sprinkle cinnamon evenly over the filling.
5. With the long side facing you, roll up the dough jellyroll fashion; pinch edges and ends together.
6. Slice into 12 sections with a sharp serrated knife.
7. Place cinnamon rolls, cut sides down, on prepared baking sheet.
8. Cover with a clean dish towel and let rise in a warm place for 45 minutes.
9. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
10. Brush tops of rolls with beaten egg.
11. Bake rolls for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown.
Yield: 12 rolls.
